title: riedelia rubra
intro: Riedelia rubra is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, commonly known as the red riedelia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Riedelia rubra include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-diarrheal, and anti-parasitic agent, which can help alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders and infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal tonic.
